notes: tracked_* covers hipEngine allocations made through hipengine.core.memory.malloc and keeps a high-water mark across freed prefill workspaces.
hip_used_peak_sampled_* is sampled via hipMemGetInfo at phase boundaries, not a continuous device-wide peak.
owned_session_* sums buffers owned by the resident session at each sampled point and excludes external HIP/AOTriton internal allocations.

owned_session_* sums buffers owned by the resident session at each sampled point and excludes external HIP/AOTriton internal allocations.
The model/session is loaded once for the largest requested shape and reset between repetitions.
Each workload uses warmup_runs discarded repetitions followed by measured_runs measured repetitions.
Measured decode excludes HIP graph capture time when graph replay is enabled; graph capture is reported per first run of each shape.

Artifact compacted by scripts/run_w7900_readme_refresh.sh: verbose per-run memory_snapshots and retained-KV buffer inventories omitted; summary_by_workload, run timings/throughput, correctness sanity fields, and numeric memory peaks retained.
